---
title: "Metabolomics"
author: Alexis Felipe Rojas Cruz
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean  
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.keep = 'all'
)
```


```{r include=FALSE, comment = ""}
# Define packages and their sources

cran_packages <- c("tidyverse", "ggplot2", "ggrepel", "readr", "ggvenn", "UpSetR")

# Install CRAN packages
missing_cran <- cran_packages[!cran_packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())]
if (length(missing_cran) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing_cran)
}

# Load all libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggvenn)
library(UpSetR)

```

# Alignment filtering

# Load data


```{r }
# Detect the header row
lines <- readLines("../GC-MS/Alignment_results/Area_peak.txt")
header_line <- grep("^Alignment ID", lines)

# Load the table from the header onward
data_raw <- read.table("../GC-MS/Alignment_results/Area_peak.txt",
                 sep = "\t",
                 header = TRUE,
                 skip = header_line - 1,
                 fill = TRUE,
                 quote = "",
                 check.names = FALSE)
```

# Find files

```{r find_files}

# data cleaning
data_clean <- data_raw %>%
  select(`Metabolite name`, starts_with("CT"), starts_with("PD"), starts_with("QC")) %>%
  mutate(`Metabolite name` = str_remove(`Metabolite name`, "^no MS2:\\s*")) %>%
  filter(!str_starts(`Metabolite name`, "Unknown")) %>%
  rename(Sample = `Metabolite name`) %>%
  mutate(Sample = make.unique(Sample, sep = "_"))

```

# RSD filtering

```{r rsd filtering}

# Define RSD function
rsd <- function(x) {
  (sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)) * 100
}

# Apply RSD calculation with dplyr
data_filtered <- data_clean %>%
  rowwise() %>%   # allows row-wise ops
  mutate(RSD = rsd(c_across(starts_with("QC")))) %>%   # compute RSD using QC columns
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(RSD < 80) %>%
  select(-RSD, -starts_with("QC"))
```

```{r rsd filtering}

label_row <- c("Label",
               rep("Healthy", sum(startsWith(names(data_filtered), "CT"))),
               rep("PD",      sum(startsWith(names(data_filtered), "PD"))))

data_final <- rbind(label_row, data_filtered)

```

```{r}

write.csv(data_final, file = "../GC-MS/Alignment_results/GC-MS_filtered.csv",
  row.names = FALSE, quote = TRUE)
```

# Venn diagram

## LC-MS (Positive)

```{r load-ancom_results}

# Load metabolites

ANOVA <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Positive/Results/volcano.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X)
sPLS.DA <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Positive/Results/splsda_loadings.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  filter(comp.1 != 0)
RF <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Positive/Results/randomforests_sigfeatures.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) %>%
  slice_head(prop = 0.05)
norm_data <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Positive/Results/data_normalized.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X)

cat("ANOVA metabolites:", nrow(ANOVA), "\n")
cat("sPLS-DA metabolites:", nrow(sPLS.DA), "\n")
cat("Random Forest (top 5%):", nrow(RF), "\n")
cat("Normalized data metabolites:", nrow(norm_data), "\n")
```


## Overlap

```{r venn-diagram}

# Combine taxa into a list for Venn plotting
meta_list <- list(
  ANOVA = ANOVA$Metabolite,
  sPLS.DA = sPLS.DA$Metabolite,
  RF = RF$Metabolite
)


# Plot
meta_venn <- ggvenn(
  meta_list,
  fill_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  fill_alpha = 0.4,
  stroke_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  stroke_size = 1,
  stroke_linetype = "solid",
  stroke_alpha = 1,
  set_name_size = 6,
  set_name_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  text_size = 8,
  text_color = "black",
  show_percentage = FALSE
) +
  theme_void()

print(meta_venn)

# Save PDF
ggsave("../LC-MS/Positive/Venn.pdf",
       meta_venn, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```


# Data Merging

```{r merging_ancom-results}
# Merging

LC.MS_positive <- ANOVA %>%
  inner_join(sPLS.DA, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(RF, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(norm_data, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  arrange(log2.FC.) %>%
   mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      log2.FC. < 0 & comp.1 < 0 ~ "Healthy",
      log2.FC. > 0 & comp.1 > 0 ~ "PD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  relocate(Group, .after = "MeanDecreaseAccuracy")

# Save

write.csv(
  LC.MS_positive,
  "../LC-MS/Positive/Merged_Metabolites.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## LC-MS (Negative)

```{r load-ancom_results}

# Load metabolites

ANOVA <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Negative/Results/volcano.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X, p.ajusted = raw.pval)
sPLS.DA <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Negative/Results/splsda_loadings.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  filter(comp.1 != 0)
RF <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Negative/Results/randomforests_sigfeatures.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) %>%
  slice_head(prop = 0.1) 
norm_data <- read.csv("../LC-MS/Negative/Results/data_normalized2.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X)

cat("ANOVA metabolites:", nrow(ANOVA), "\n")
cat("sPLS-DA metabolites:", nrow(sPLS.DA), "\n")
cat("Random Forest (top 5%):", nrow(RF), "\n")
cat("Normalized data metabolites:", nrow(norm_data), "\n")

```


## Overlap

```{r venn-diagram}

# Combine taxa into a list for Venn plotting
meta_list <- list(
  ANOVA = ANOVA$Metabolite,
  sPLS.DA = sPLS.DA$Metabolite,
  RF = RF$Metabolite
)


# Plot
meta_venn <- ggvenn(
  meta_list,
  fill_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  fill_alpha = 0.4,
  stroke_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  stroke_size = 1,
  stroke_linetype = "solid",
  stroke_alpha = 1,
  set_name_size = 6,
  set_name_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  text_size = 8,
  text_color = "black",
  show_percentage = FALSE
) +
  theme_void()

print(meta_venn)

# Save PDF
ggsave("../LC-MS/Negative/Venn.pdf",
       meta_venn, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```


# Data Merging

```{r merging_ancom-results}
# Merging

LC.MS_negative <- ANOVA %>%
  inner_join(sPLS.DA, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(RF, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(norm_data, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  arrange(log2.FC.) %>%
   mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      log2.FC. < 0 & comp.1 > 0 ~ "Healthy",
      log2.FC. > 0 & comp.1 < 0 ~ "PD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  relocate(Group, .after = "MeanDecreaseAccuracy")

# Save

write.csv(
  LC.MS_negative,
  "../LC-MS/Negative/Merged_Metabolites.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## GC-MS

```{r load-ancom_results}

# Load metabolites

ANOVA <- read.csv("../GC-MS/Results/volcano.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X)
sPLS.DA <- read.csv("../GC-MS/Results/splsda_loadings.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  filter(comp.1 != 0)
RF <- read.csv("../GC-MS/Results/randomforests_sigfeatures.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X) %>%
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) %>%
  slice_head(prop = 0.1)
norm_data <- read.csv("../GC-MS/Results/data_normalized2.csv") %>%
  rename(Metabolite = X)

cat("ANOVA metabolites:", nrow(ANOVA), "\n")
cat("sPLS-DA metabolites:", nrow(sPLS.DA), "\n")
cat("Random Forest (top 5%):", nrow(RF), "\n")
cat("Normalized data metabolites:", nrow(norm_data), "\n")

```


## Overlap

```{r venn-diagram}

# Combine taxa into a list for Venn plotting
meta_list <- list(
  ANOVA = ANOVA$Metabolite,
  sPLS.DA = sPLS.DA$Metabolite,
  RF = RF$Metabolite
)


# Plot
meta_venn <- ggvenn(
  meta_list,
  fill_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  fill_alpha = 0.4,
  stroke_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  stroke_size = 1,
  stroke_linetype = "solid",
  stroke_alpha = 1,
  set_name_size = 6,
  set_name_color = c("#4C9F70", "#6A4C37", "#B8B88D"),
  text_size = 8,
  text_color = "black",
  show_percentage = FALSE
) +
  theme_void()

print(meta_venn)

# Save PDF
ggsave("../GC-MS/Venn.pdf",
       meta_venn, width = 8, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```


# Data Merging

```{r merging results}
# Merging

GC.MS <- ANOVA %>%
  inner_join(sPLS.DA, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(RF, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  inner_join(norm_data, by = "Metabolite") %>%
  arrange(log2.FC.) %>%
   mutate(
    Group = case_when(
      log2.FC. < 0 & comp.1 < 0 ~ "Healthy",
      log2.FC. > 0 & comp.1 > 0 ~ "PD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  relocate(Group, .after = "MeanDecreaseAccuracy")
# Save

write.csv(
  GC.MS,
  "../GC-MS/Merged_Metabolites.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

```

## Final metabolites

```{r merging results}
final_metabolites <- bind_rows(
  LC.MS_positive %>% mutate(Type = "Positive"),
  LC.MS_negative %>% mutate(Type = "Negative"),
  GC.MS %>% mutate(Type = "GC-MS")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Metabolite = gsub("_[0-9]+$", "", Metabolite)
  ) %>%
  relocate(Type, .after = "Group")

Healthy_meta <- final_metabolites %>%
  filter(Group == "Healthy") %>%
  select(Metabolite, starts_with("CT"), starts_with("PD"))

PD_meta <- final_metabolites %>%
  filter(Group == "PD") %>%
  select(Metabolite, starts_with("CT"), starts_with("PD"))

# Save
write.csv(final_metabolites, "Final_metabolites.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = TRUE)
write.csv(Healthy_meta, "Healthy_metabolites.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = TRUE)
write.csv(PD_meta, "PD_metabolites.csv", row.names = FALSE, quote = TRUE)
```

# Build UpSet input: metabolite × platform matrix

```{r upset-data}

met_platform <- final_metabolites %>%
  mutate(
    Metabolite = make.unique(Metabolite, sep = "_")
  ) %>%
  mutate(present = 1) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Type,
    values_from = present,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  as.data.frame()

# Use metabolite names as rownames
rownames(met_platform) <- met_platform$Metabolite
met_platform$Metabolite <- NULL

```

```{r upset-plot}

## Define platforms (sets)

set_vars <- c("Positive", "Negative", "GC-MS")

## Plot settings

mb_ratio1 <- c(0.65, 0.35)
text_scale_options3 <- c(
  2.5,  # numbers on top of bars (intersection size)
  1.8,  # set names
  1.6,  # set sizes
  1.4,  # axis titles
  2.2,  # main bar title
  1.8   # matrix labels
)

# setting colors
main_bar_col <- c("violetred4")
sets_bar_col <- c("turquoise4")
matrix_col   <- c("slateblue4")
shade_col    <- c("wheat4")

# UpSet plot

upset(
  met_platform,
  sets = set_vars,
  mb.ratio = mb_ratio1,
  mainbar.y.label = "Number of metabolites",
  sets.x.label = "Detected per platform",
  order.by = "freq",
  show.numbers = "yes",
  point.size = 4,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = text_scale_options3,
  main.bar.color = main_bar_col,
  sets.bar.color = sets_bar_col,
  matrix.color = matrix_col,
  shade.color = shade_col
)

```

```{r upset-save}
pdf("UpSet_metabolites.pdf", width = 9, height = 7)

upset(
  met_platform,
  sets = set_vars,
  mb.ratio = mb_ratio1,
  mainbar.y.label = "Number of metabolites",
  sets.x.label = "Detected per platform",
  order.by = "freq",
  show.numbers = "yes",
  point.size = 4,
  line.size = 1,
  text.scale = text_scale_options3,
  main.bar.color = main_bar_col,
  sets.bar.color = sets_bar_col,
  matrix.color = matrix_col,
  shade.color = shade_col
)

dev.off()

```
## Session info

```{r session_information}
Sys.time()
getwd()
  
sessionInfo()
```
